name: Software Engineer
summary: Builds digital products and solves technical problems through code.
pathwayNotes: Strong maths/computing foundation, projects, and internships are helpful.

name: Psychologist
summary: Studies behavior and supports mental wellbeing in clinical or educational settings.
pathwayNotes: Usually requires psychology degree and supervised training.

name: Marketing Strategist
summary: Designs campaigns and messaging to reach audiences effectively.
pathwayNotes: Marketing/business coursework plus portfolio and analytics skills.

name: Civil Engineer
summary: Designs and maintains infrastructure such as roads, bridges, and water systems.
pathwayNotes: Strong STEM subjects and accredited engineering programs are common paths.

name: UX Designer
summary: Improves digital experiences through user research, design, and testing.
pathwayNotes: Design portfolio, user research practice, and prototyping tools are key.

name: Teacher
summary: Guides students in learning and personal development.
pathwayNotes: Subject specialization plus teacher training and certification.

name: Entrepreneur
summary: Builds ventures by identifying opportunities and managing uncertainty.
pathwayNotes: Business fundamentals, experimentation, and networking matter.

name: Data Analyst
summary: Extracts insights from data to inform decisions.
pathwayNotes: Statistics, spreadsheets/SQL, and data storytelling are important.

name: Nurse
summary: Provides patient care and supports healthcare teams.
pathwayNotes: Science subjects and accredited nursing training are required.

name: Journalist
summary: Investigates stories, interviews sources, and communicates public-interest information.
pathwayNotes: Writing portfolio, media experience, and strong critical thinking help.
